title: Pukka Pad, Concord Visitors Record Book – Refillable 3 Ring Binder with 50 Sheets, 2000 Entry Spaces, Black
features: Professional Appearance: Simple and sophisticated black fabric finish is suitable for display and uses in professional offices, lobbies, doctor’s offices, entry areas, and more
Ready to Use: Premium hardback binder comes with pre-printed grey loose-leaf sheets for 2000 guest entries with clear, reinforced punch holes on every sheet for durability

All-In-One: Make record-keeping easy by having essential visitor information in one place: date, name, company, car registration, person visiting, badge number, time in, time out; easily keep track of all visitors on site
Refillable: Three ring mechanism easily opens to allow for removal and replacement of visitor record sheets
Product Specifications: Landscape display; binder measures 230 x 335 millimeters
description: Product Description Ready to Use The Visitors Book comes complete with areas to fill out the date, name, address, and any additional comments so you can get all the important details easily High Quality This book features 120GSM paper to prevent ghosting and bleeding and a beautiful hardcover to keep the contents safe and secure Plenty of Space With 100 pages and 20 entries per page, you get a total of 2000 entry spaces, plenty for all your visitors over time Concord Visitors Book Binder Pukka Pad, Bloom A4 Visitors Book – 96 Pages, Cream Pukka Pad, Bloom A4 Visitors Book – 96 Pages , Black Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 243 4.6 out of 5 stars 234 4.6 out of 5 stars 234 Price £16.88 £ 16 . 88 £8.98 £ 8 . 98 £14.25 £ 14 . 25 Ideal for doctors’ offices, businesses, schools, and more doctors’ offices, businesses, schools, and more doctors’ offices, businesses, schools, and more Capacity 2000 entry spaces 768 entry spaces 768 entry spaces Size A4 A4 A4 Colour Black Bloom, cream Bloom, black Number of Pages 100 pages 96 pages 96 pages Binding Ring Binding Case Binding Case Binding
